payload.author: claude
payload.body: Delivered: dir/Cargo.toml walk + per-file aggregation, composes with --rules (advisory). REMAINING DEPTH (follow-up): (1) auto-build the dependency signature index from cargo's dep graph so cross-crate R0042 works without manual TRUST_SIGNATURE_PATH; (2) the CLI walk lints each file independently, so --rules all cross-FILE named-arg (R0042) resolution still relies on the wrapper's crate-wide registry, not the walk. Advisory modes (bugs/safety) are fully correct per-file since they need no cross-file deps.
